headline: Up 373%, Is ExxonMobil Proving Why It Was a Mistake for Salesforce to Replace ExxonMobil in the Dow Jones Industrial Average?
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average would be even higher if it had more exposure to energy stocks.
